item.name: project5g
item.title: Project5g
item.description: An artistic component featuring staggered fade-in animations, structured into a header and main area. It contains a 5-column grid layout in the header and grids that shift from 3 to 2 columns in the main part, for displaying text and images related to an art exhibition. Unique elements include variable text spans and carefully positioned images within adjustable aspect ratios.
